subject: DevOps
title: Dependency Management in IaC
description: Learn Dependency Management in IaC in one minute.

hook.text: You can't create a subnet before the VPC exists. You can't attach a policy before the role exists. Order matters.

buildup.text: Terraform builds a dependency graph automatically. It reads references between resources and determines the order.

discovery.text: Explicit depends_on forces an order when Terraform can't detect the dependency. Rare but sometimes essential.

twist.text: Circular dependencies break the graph. Resource A depends on B, and B depends on A. Terraform refuses to plan.

climax.text: Parallelism speeds things up. Independent resources are created simultaneously. Only dependent ones wait in sequence.

punchline.text: Terraform graphs dependencies. Parallel when safe, sequential when needed.

quiz.question: How does Terraform determine the order to create resources?
options: It builds a dependency graph from references between resources
It creates resources alphabetically by name
It creates all resources simultaneously regardless of dependencies
